/usr/bin/clang-18 -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fsanitize=address "CMakeFiles/pty-tui-test-runner.dir/test_tui_startup.c.o" "CMakeFiles/pty-tui-test-runner.dir/pty_tel_stub.c.o" "CMakeFiles/pty-tui-test-runner.dir/__/__/__/src/core/crypto.c.o" -o pty-tui-test-runner  ../../../libs/libptytest/libptytest.a ../../../libtg-app.a ../../../libtg-proto.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lutil ../../../libtg-crypto.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
